notes: Consistency + consolidation pass: (1) Criterion 5 charts now render with the same ucc-demo-* CSS components as Criteria 1-4/6/7 (was the only dashboard using D3 SVG); (2) every criterion's readiness banner reworded to friendly, code-free text 'Live data connected - X of Y sources available - A of B metrics available', with raw policy codes removed from all banners, and Criterion 5's readiness banner (which a data-status selector clash had been overwriting) fixed to actually show; (3) the separate Data Quality and Sources tabs merged into one 'Sources & Data Quality' tab across all criteria, with Criterion 5's Source Availability widget folded in. Audit-focused visual reduction: each criterion trimmed to ~30 active visuals (627 -> 212 active, 415 archived). Cut visuals are NOT deleted - they carry enabled:false in LIVE_VISUAL_EXPANSION/C4_VISUAL_EXPANSION or are listed in C5_DISABLED_VISUALS, are hidden from render/menu/Explore, and are documented in documentation/archived-visuals.md for restoration. Active per-criterion counts: 30/30/30/30/32/30/30. Prior: Visual card refactor complete for all 7 criteria (627 visuals): a description per visual, click-to-render charts (deferred and cached instead of built eagerly), a title+toggle header row with the description replacing the old generic sentence, and matching descriptions in the visual navigation menu and Explore workspace list. Criterion 5, on its own static-HTML card path with ~94 hand-written D3 render calls (distinct from the CONFIG-driven demo-kind criteria and from Criterion 4's C4_VISUAL_EXPANSION path), now has full click-to-render parity: a generic deferral wrapper around its 12 chart-drawing functions builds each card's Diagram/Table toggle and description up front (reusing the existing static toggle where one is already pre-built, or building one dynamically where it isn't) without drawing the chart itself, then triggers the real draw on first click and caches it. Sorted the chart-card grid alphabetically by visual name for every criterion and subcriterion, matching the visual navigation menu's existing alphabetical order (the menu was already sorted; the actual rendered cards were not). Fixed direct-URL deep-linking: the ?dashboard= query parameter was never read on page load, so navigating straight to a URL with that parameter left whatever dashboard was last saved in localStorage active instead of switching. Also fixed scoped Source Mapping Report styling, exact visual catalogue ownership and counts, slow-load blank detection, and confirmed UCC DocType mappings.
